name: Wasp
description: A highly aggressive aerial predator that in Grounded 2 already feels like a late-run threat even outside boss encounters. One demands respect; several together turn the sky into forbidden space.
behavior: It patrols high overhead and dives violently the moment it spots a threat. It alternates pecks, stings, and stinger shots to force you to read height, cover, and the timing between rushes.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and punishes positioning mistakes brutally. If you lose cover or run out of ranged answers, the fight drags out and almost always starts tilting in the wasp's favor.
interactionWithCreatures: It is neutral toward many creatures, but highly hostile toward bees and mosquitoes. Its mere presence often clears the air because several smaller creatures would rather flee than deal with it.
strategy: The best answer is to isolate it and punish it with ranged damage or very clean melee windows. Its close attacks are blockable, but the stinger shot and the group fight are what really push it into impossible territory.
inflicts: Its sting attacks deal stabbing damage with venom buildup; the stinger shot deals busting damage and can also build venom.

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.description: A direct blockable sting that applies 10 venom buildup on hit.

abilities.name: Charged Sting
abilities.description: It charges in a straight line with its stinger forward and applies venom buildup on hit.

abilities.name: Stinger Shot
abilities.description: It fires a stinger projectile. Weapons cannot block it, but shields can.
